title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers presents a tutorial on building AI agents using the Strands Agents SDK. The video demonstrates four progressively complex agents: single-tool, multi-tool, observable-loop, and multi-agent orchestrator variants. The core concept is that agents are fundamentally loops where a model reasons, selects tools, executes them, and repeats.
